overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, navigating a futuristic vehicle through rainy, neon-lit Night City streets. The journey transitions from open intersections to enclosed highways and dense commercial districts with heavy cyberpunk aesthetic.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet city intersection with neon signage and crosswalks

events.description: slowing down and executing a right turn at the intersection crosswalk
entering the covered highway structure with red structural beams

agents.ego_description: navigating through rain-slicked streets and turning right at a busy intersection with neon-lit storefronts

notable_agents.action: black sedan ahead braking for the intersection

entered.detail: rain-slicked multi-lane road reflecting purple and pink neon lights
tall digital signage with glowing purple and cyan advertisements
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings
tropical palm trees lining the street median

segments.scene_description: Driving through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city intersection at night, with neon billboards illuminating the wet streets. The vehicle slows and turns right at a crosswalk, passing palm trees and entering a covered highway structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed elevated highway with red structural beams and artificial lighting

events.description: transitioning from natural rain ambiance to red neon-lit artificial lighting inside the covered highway

agents.ego_description: accelerating through the covered highway section following the vehicle ahead

notable_agents.action: vehicle with glowing red taillights maintaining distance ahead

entered.detail: massive red steel support columns and overhead trusswork lining the highway
concrete and metal overhead covering blocking the rain
large illuminated advertisement screen mounted on the interior wall

segments.scene_description: Driving through an enclosed highway tunnel with distinctive red structural beams and artificial red lighting. The space is sheltered from the rain, with digital billboards visible on the walls as the vehicle follows traffic ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated city highway with skyline views and moderate traffic

events.description: exiting the covered highway structure back into the open air with rain visible again
merging with moderate traffic flow on the elevated highway

agents.ego_description: cruising on the elevated highway with moderate traffic, overtaking vehicles on the right

notable_agents.action: black pickup truck driving parallel in the right lane

entered.detail: teal and red safety barriers with reflective strips along the road edge
tall futuristic glass buildings with illuminated windows visible in the distance
large white SLOW text painted on the asphalt surface

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered highway into open air with rain falling again, driving along an elevated roadway with views of the distant skyscraper skyline. The vehicle merges with moderate traffic, passing a black pickup truck while large SLOW markings are visible on the wet road.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial street with storefronts, billboards, and tunnel approach

events.description: stopping at red traffic light behind a pickup truck at the intersection
entering the dark tunnel underpass at the end of the commercial district

agents.ego_description: navigating through dense commercial streets, stopping at traffic lights, and entering a tunnel underpass

notable_agents.action: rusted pickup truck stopped at red light ahead
pedestrians walking on sidewalk under building awnings

entered.detail: ground-level shops with glowing neon signs and protective awnings
large floating holographic advertisements and building-mounted digital screens
construction barriers with orange and white stripes lining the sidewalk
dark concrete underpass entrance with illuminated signage above

segments.scene_description: Driving through a dense commercial district with holographic billboards and ground-level shops, pedestrians visible on the sidewalks under awnings. The vehicle stops at a red light behind a pickup truck, then proceeds into a dark tunnel underpass as the segment ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive through a rain-slicked cyberpunk metropolis that transitions from open neon intersections into enclosed industrial tunnels and back into a dense commercial district. It begins by navigating a wet city intersection illuminated by neon billboards, slowing to turn right past palm trees and entering a covered highway structure. As the vehicle moves inside, the environment shifts to a sheltered tunnel defined by artificial red lighting and structural beams before emerging back into the open air and falling rain. The camera then glides along an elevated roadway with views of a distant skyscraper skyline, passing a black pickup truck and road markings before descending into a crowded commercial area filled with holographic billboards and pedestrians. Finally, the vehicle comes to a brief halt at a red light behind another truck before proceeding forward into a dark tunnel underpass.
